headline: Is Estée Lauder (EL) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Volatility And DCF Signals
summary: If you are wondering whether Estée Lauder Companies is attractively priced right now, you are not alone. The stock's valuation story has become much more interesting for long term investors. The share price closed at US$92.72, with returns of a 15.3% decline over 7 days, a 6.8% decline over 30 days, a 13.2% decline year to date, a 28.5% gain over 1 year, and declines of 58.5% over 3 years and 65.5% over 5 years. This paints a mixed picture of risk and recovery potential. Recent coverage...
